full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Drafting the one-paragraph paper summary for the report
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write a one-paragraph summary of the DCD linear SVM paper (Hsieh et al. ICML 2008) in my own words. Cover: the problem addressed, the method proposed, and the convergence guarantee.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a draft; I edited to ensure it is not copied from the paper and reflects my own understanding.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Reworded all sentences to ensure no verbatim copying from the abstract or paper text.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked that all claims in the summary (O(log(1/eps)) convergence, random permutation, linear kernel advantage) are present in the paper.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Write the honest reflection section for the report: what I could not implement, what surprised me, and what I would revisit. Must be honest and match my actual results.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided a template; I edited to match actual results (e.g., shrinking not implemented, the O(n-bar) sparsity advantage not visible on dense data).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added specific observations from my actual experiments: convergence in ~30 iterations, ~87% accuracy, and the absence of the shrinking implementation affecting efficiency.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: All statements in the reflection match the actual notebook outputs.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Write a one-paragraph summary of the DCD linear SVM paper in my own words.
top_5_prompts.why_selected: Core of the 3-mark paper summary requirement.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Write the honest reflection section: what I could not implement, what surprised me, what I would revisit.
top_5_prompts.why_selected: Direct match to the 3-mark reflection requirement.

student_declaration.statement: I declare this is a complete record of LLM usage for Task 4.1 (Report). The report content was edited significantly from LLM drafts to reflect my honest observations.
